scripts.build: pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor build && pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-cli build && pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-devtools build && pnpm --filter @openprose/prose-cli build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor test && pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-cli test && pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-devtools test && pnpm --filter @openprose/prose-cli test && pnpm test:skill && pnpm test:examples
scripts.test:reactor:offline: REACTOR_OFFLINE=1 pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor test && REACTOR_OFFLINE=1 pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-cli test && REACTOR_OFFLINE=1 pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-devtools test
scripts.test:examples: REACTOR_OFFLINE=1 vitest run tests/open-prose/examples skills/open-prose/examples && pnpm test:eval:offline
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor run lint --if-present && pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-cli run lint --if-present && pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-devtools run lint --if-present && pnpm --filter @openprose/prose-cli run lint --if-present
